entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop Arachis hypogaea L. evaluated for iron deficiency chlorosis tolerance.

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY CHLOROSIS
entities.description: A physiological disorder causing yellowing of leaves due to iron deficiency, common in calcareous and alkaline soils.

entities.name: CALCAREOUS AND ALKALINE SOILS
entities.description: Soil types characterized by high calcium carbonate and high pH that induce iron deficiency chlorosis.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where groundnut is grown in calcareous and alkaline soils prone to IDC.

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: A country where groundnut is grown in calcareous and alkaline soils prone to IDC.

entities.name: PAKISTAN
entities.description: A country where groundnut is grown in calcareous and alkaline soils prone to IDC.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of groundnut measured by the weight or number of pods.

entities.name: MINI-CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of a larger germplasm collection used to capture maximum genetic diversity.

entities.name: IDC TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut genotypes to maintain growth and yield despite iron deficiency chlorosis.

entities.name: VISUAL CHLOROTIC RATING
entities.description: A qualitative measurement used to assess the severity of chlorosis in leaves.

entities.name: SPAD CHLOROPHYLL METER READING
entities.description: A quantitative measurement of chlorophyll content in leaves using a SPAD meter.

entities.name: HYPOGAEA BUNCH
entities.description: A botanical variety of groundnut found to be most tolerant to IDC.

entities.name: HYPOGAEA RUNNER
entities.description: A botanical variety of groundnut evaluated for IDC tolerance.

entities.name: FASTIGIATA
entities.description: A botanical variety of groundnut evaluated for IDC tolerance.

entities.name: VULGARIS
entities.description: A botanical variety of groundnut evaluated for IDC tolerance.

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical technique used to reduce dimensionality and explain variation among traits.

entities.name: BIPLOT
entities.description: A graphical representation used to visualize the relationship between genotypes and traits.

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL CLUSTERING
entities.description: A statistical method used to group genotypes into clusters based on similarity in IDC response.
